description: Top 15 grading targets per TCG — sorted by hold potential. Tier S = blue chips, A = strong holds, B = arb plays, C = speculative.

cards.searchQuery: Charizard Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded -slab
cards.psa10Query: Charizard Base Set 1st Edition Holo PSA 10
cards.notes: The holy grail. Centering is #1 issue — most copies are off-center. Gem Mint extremely rare.

cards.searchQuery: Charizard Base Set Shadowless Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded -1st
cards.notes: Often misidentified as Unlimited. Check: no shadow under card art box. PSA 10 pop tiny.

cards.searchQuery: Lugia Neo Genesis 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Next Charizard for Gen 2 players. Undervalued vs 1st Ed Zard. Strong buy under €1500.

cards.searchQuery: Blastoise Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Underrated vs Charizard. Starter bias means many copies exist in played condition — NM is rarer than people think.

cards.searchQuery: Ho-Oh Neo Revelation 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Hugely overlooked. PSA 10 pop comparable to Lugia but cheaper entry. Gen 2 nostalgia catalyst incoming.

cards.searchQuery: Venusaur Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Third starter, often overlooked but same rarity as Blastoise. Centering is the kill shot for most.

cards.searchQuery: Mewtwo Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Most iconic Pokémon after Pikachu. PSA 10 premium solid. Surface scratches common.

cards.searchQuery: Gengar Fossil 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Fan favourite. Pop report thin in PSA 10. Strong upside if you find NM copy.

cards.searchQuery: Raichu Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Pikachu's evolution. Undervalued relative to Pikachu hype. Solid 3-year play.

cards.searchQuery: Alakazam Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Psychic fan favourite. Original 151 nostalgia drives consistent demand.

cards.searchQuery: Gyarados Base Set 1st Edition Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Best arb play in base set outside the big 3. Low raw price, big PSA10 premium.

cards.searchQuery: Charizard ex 151 Special Illustration Rare -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Charizard ex 151 Special Illustration Rare PSA 10
cards.notes: Modern Charizard. Already heavily graded but PSA 10 premium still holds. Sell before next reprint.

cards.cardName: Umbreon ex Prismatic Evolutions Special Illustration Rare
cards.searchQuery: Umbreon ex Prismatic Evolutions Special Illustration -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Umbreon ex Prismatic Evolutions Special Illustration PSA 10
cards.notes: Hot right now. Grade immediately — premium will drop as more PSA10s enter market.

cards.cardName: Espeon ex Golden Sky Silvery Ocean 2005 Japanese Holo
cards.searchQuery: Espeon ex Golden Sky Silvery Ocean Japanese Holo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Espeon ex Golden Sky Silvery Ocean PSA 10
cards.notes: Japanese-only. Eevee-lution mania drives this. Global collector demand growing.

cards.searchQuery: CoroCoro Shining Mew Japanese Promo -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Magazine insert — many came folded. NM copies extremely rare. PSA 9 often best realistic target.

cards.searchQuery: Blue-Eyes White Dragon LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Blue-Eyes White Dragon LOB 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: The YGO Charizard. Print lines and centering are common issues. Any NM copy is worth grading.

cards.cardName: Exodia the Forbidden One LOB 1st Edition
cards.searchQuery: Exodia the Forbidden One LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Exodia the Forbidden One LOB 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: One of five Exodia pieces — collect all five for legendary set value. PSA 10 pop tiny.

cards.searchQuery: Dark Magician LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Yugi's signature monster. Iconic beyond competitive. Print lines are the enemy.

cards.searchQuery: Red-Eyes Black Dragon LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Red-Eyes Black Dragon LOB 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: Joey's dragon. Undervalued vs Blue-Eyes — same rarity, half the price. Strong buy.

cards.searchQuery: Monster Reborn LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Banned spell, iconic art. Cheap raw entry, massive PSA 10 multiple. Best arb in LOB.

cards.searchQuery: Pot of Greed LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Pot of Greed LOB 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: The most memed card in YGO history. Permanently banned. Cultural icon. Grade every NM copy you find.

cards.searchQuery: Raigeki LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Banned since 2004 on and off. The lightning bolt is iconic. Same arb logic as Pot of Greed.

cards.searchQuery: Jinzo PSV 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Mid-tier holy grail. Strong PSA 10 premium. Often found in played collections.

cards.searchQuery: Mirror Force MRD Metal Raiders 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: One of the most replayed traps in history. First print has distinct holo pattern.

cards.cardName: Witch of the Black Forest MRL 1st Edition
cards.searchQuery: Witch of the Black Forest MRL 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Witch of the Black Forest MRL 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: Banned. Essential combo piece from original meta. Underrated grading target.

cards.searchQuery: Summoned Skull LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Iconic demon. LOB holo. Print lines kill most copies — NM is genuinely rare.

cards.searchQuery: Thousand-Eyes Restrict MFC 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Banned. Nightmare of early competitive. Low raw price = low barrier to entry for grading.

cards.searchQuery: Dark Hole LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: LOB spell. Strong multiple but smaller absolute profit. Good bulk grading candidate.

cards.searchQuery: Change of Heart LOB 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Change of Heart LOB 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: Banned spell. Angel art iconic. Same tier as Dark Hole but slightly lower demand.

cards.searchQuery: Blue-Eyes White Dragon SDK Kaiba 1st Edition -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.psa10Query: Blue-Eyes White Dragon SDK 1st Edition PSA 10
cards.notes: Starter deck print. Lower than LOB but accessible entry point. Surface damage is common.

cards.searchQuery: Black Lotus Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: The most valuable TCG card ever printed. If you find one, grade it same day. Plays, bends, fakes all common.

cards.searchQuery: Black Lotus Beta Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Beta has rounder corners than Alpha. Still the holy grail. PSA 9 already €50k+.

cards.searchQuery: Ancestral Recall Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Power Nine card. PSA 10 virtually non-existent. PSA 9 is the realistic ceiling for most copies.

cards.searchQuery: Mox Sapphire Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Power Nine. Blue = highest demand colour in MTG. Strong and growing.

cards.searchQuery: Time Walk Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Power Nine. One of the most broken cards ever. Condition rarely seen above PSA 8.

cards.cardName: Tropical Island Alpha MTG Dual Land
cards.searchQuery: Tropical Island Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Alpha dual lands are the next Power Nine target. Tropical Island is top demand.

cards.searchQuery: Force of Will Alliances Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Format-defining counterspell. Never reprinted in original art at same scarcity. Strong arb.

cards.cardName: Underground Sea Revised MTG Dual Land
cards.searchQuery: Underground Sea Revised Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Revised duals are accessible entry to Legacy staples. PSA 10 premium strong.

cards.cardName: Volcanic Island Beta MTG Dual Land
cards.searchQuery: Volcanic Island Beta Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Beta duals are the next alpha. Fire-themed lands always outperform.

cards.searchQuery: Tarmogoyf Future Sight Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: The Eternal format creature. Future Sight print is the most desirable. Low pop in PSA 10.

cards.cardName: Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale Legends MTG
cards.searchQuery: Tabernacle Pendrell Vale Legends Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Legendary Legends card. Sees Legacy play. PSA 10 pop extremely low — most copies heavily played.

cards.cardName: Traveling Chocobo Final Fantasy MTG Borderless
cards.searchQuery: Traveling Chocobo Final Fantasy MTG Borderless -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Crossover hype. FF fans + MTG collectors. Neon Ink variants most valuable. Speculative but strong short-term.

cards.searchQuery: Sol Ring Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Evergreen Commander staple + Alpha print. PSA 10 pop near zero. Always relevant.

cards.searchQuery: Mox Ruby Alpha Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Most accessible Power Nine by demand. Red players always want this.

cards.searchQuery: Summer Magic Hurricane Blue Magic the Gathering -PSA -BGS -CGC -graded
cards.notes: Summer Magic (1994 recall) is rarer than Alpha. Blue Hurricane specifically — unique misprint era.
